hooks.command: echo 'CLASI: You used the Agent tool instead of a dispatch_to_* MCP tool.'; echo 'Dispatch tools provide logging and contract validation.'; echo 'Use dispatch_to_* unless you have a specific reason not to.'

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^(master|main)$'; then echo 'CLASI: You committed on master. Call tag_version() to bump the version.'; fi
